title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.3, Phi 4, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui (formerly ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama with chat history, RAG, user management, and OpenAI-compatible endpoints.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async APIs, streaming, embeddings, and custom timeouts.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama; simple DSL for chat, completions, embeddings, and model operations.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based CLI that wraps Ollama with prompts history, syntax highlighting, and shell integration.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like VS Code extension powered by local Ollama models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and PVCs.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-camunda
summary: Camunda 8 connector that invokes Ollama models from BPMN service tasks for AI-powered workflows.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n node to call Ollama models in no-code workflows; chat, completion, and embeddings operations.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Minimal RAG chatbot template using Ollama, ChromaDB, and LangChain for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that chats in channels or threads using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Go-based Slack bot that answers questions via Ollama with configurable system prompts.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an AI sidebar powered by local Ollama models for note Q&A and summarization.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper for Ollama with GenServer-backed clients and streaming support.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package for Ollama; chat, completions, and embeddings with async/await.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Official Rust crate providing ergonomic async bindings to the Ollama HTTP API.
